since_last: 51% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.03%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.95% · BTC -2.38% · Gold -0.66% · Nasdaq100 -2.64%. 51% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.03%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.03%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.27%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -11.30%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +5.53%, SPCX +5.47%, NET +5.21%, NOW +4.68%, CHKP +3.90%. Laggards: MU -11.30%, VRT -9.74%, LRCX -8.90%, ARM -8.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.47% at $163.06
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
